columns.name: avdNr
columns.description: The unique identifier for the department

columns.name: tellEnr
columns.description: The enrollment number of the tell (counting device)

columns.name: levNr
columns.description: The level number, likely related to storage levels or tiers

columns.name: levVareEnr
columns.description: The unique identifier for the ware at a specific level

columns.name: plassNr
columns.description: The placement number, indicating where on the shelf or in the warehouse an item is stored

columns.name: kurAnsgradAvd
columns.description: The grade or level of curvature for the department

columns.name: beholdning
columns.description: The current stock level in units or volume, representing the quantity of a particular item in storage

columns.name: beholdningTellet
columns.description: The number of items counted during the last stock count or verification process

columns.name: avvik
columns.description: The difference between the actual stock level and the expected or recorded stock level, indicating discrepancies

columns.name: arSak
columns.description: A code representing the reason for any deviations or issues in stock management

columns.name: komentar
columns.description: Any additional comments or notes related to the stock keeping process, such as observations or instructions

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: The exact time when the last update or action regarding the stock level was performed

columns.name: bruker
columns.description: The user who performed the latest operation on the stock, such as a count or adjustment

columns.name: signatur
columns.description: The signature of the person responsible for the last update or action related to the stock level
